epg.title: Abba v Bee Gees: Love Songs
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

60 minutes of love songs from 2 of the biggest acts of the 70s - Abba & The Bee Gees.

epg.title: Unforgettable! Top 30
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

Simon Bates with 30 amazing songs of the 60s & 70s from artists whose fame & reputation will live on forever. Including Roy Orbison, Aretha Franklin, Dionne Warwick & The Beatles.

epg.title: Help Me Make It Through the Night!
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

Non-stop love songs, back to back all night, from the era of Leo Sayer, Carpenters, The Bee Gees & Minnie Ripperton.

epg.title: Top Singalongs! 1970-1979
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

In order - 5 hours of the biggest karaoke anthems of the 70s - from Mungo Jerry & T.Rex to Abba, Blondie & Queen. Prepare to sing out loud!

epg.title: Blackburn's 25 Blue Sky Belters!
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

Tony Blackburn brings the sunshine to you - 70s style! Every vid is full of outdoor fun - with Dr Hook & ELO, Elton & Abba, Bee Gees & Boney M!

epg.title: Spring Has Sprung!
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

Feelgood hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?

epg.title: 30 Dead Catchy Choruses!
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

From disco to rock via Grease & Abba - these are the songs with the 30 biggest singalong hooks of the 70s!

epg.title: Far Out, Man!
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

Over-bearded men & leftfield ladies - all with fabulous tunes! These are alternative hits from the west coast, the underground & the counter culture of the 1970s.

epg.title: What The Heck Kept This Off No.1?
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

Every one of these superb No.2 hits from 1970-1979 is a classic, but what other songs stopped each of them getting to the top? Queen, Ringo, Elton, Boney M and more are all here!

epg.title: 25 Girls In Love - In The 70s!
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

From classic power ballads to life affirming love songs - smoochy girls, devastating divas, and pop princesses. That's the Name Of The Game for the next 2 hours!

epg.title: What The Heck Kept This Off No.1?
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

Every one of these superb No.2 hits from 1970-1979 is a classic, but what other songs stopped each of them getting to the top? Queen, Ringo, Elton, Boney M and more are all here!

epg.title: One Hit Wonders! 1970-1979
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

They all had 1 massive song, then never skirted the UK Top 20 singles chart again! Here are 25 acts from every year of the 70s, in order, who all achieved their 15 minutes of fame.

epg.title: Far Out, Man!
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

Over-bearded men & leftfield ladies - all with fabulous tunes! These are alternative hits from the west coast, the underground & the counter culture of the 1970s.

epg.title: Great Song - Stupid Title! 1970-79
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

Robin Banks with 30 amazing songs, 30 nonsense titles! Fancy a Dreadlock Holiday or a drive down the 2468 Motorway? This is where to come!

epg.title: It's A MASSIVE 70s Party Night!
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

From hippies to punk rockers, via folk, funk, soul & disco - these are the classic songs that made the 70s!

epg.title: NOW 100 Hits: Love Songs!
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

Simon Bates with the ultimate countdown of 70s love songs. 100 songs with heartfelt vocals, lush strings & big breakdowns in an 8 hour marathon! Expect Chicago, Eric Carmen & 10cc.

epg.title: Daydreamers: A Whole Day of Love!
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

Non-stop love songs, back to back all day, from the era of Leo Sayer, Carpenters, The Bee Gees & Minnie Ripperton.

epg.title: Tony Blackburn's 70s Soul!
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

Slick ballads, funky beats & soulful disco - Tony has the lot in a 2 hour session of sensational 70s soul!

epg.title: Daydreamers: A Whole Day of Love!
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

Non-stop love songs, back to back all day, from the era of Leo Sayer, Carpenters, The Bee Gees & Minnie Ripperton.

epg.title: 100% Superstars! 1970-1979
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

From Led Zep to Pink Floyd via Fleetwood Mac, Queen, Billy Joel, Carole King & Abba - these are the biggest music stars of the 70s. Period.

epg.title: Magic Moments! The 70s
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

Experience the magic of the 70s, where every beat was a spell and every song a timeless enchantment!

epg.title: Hamilton's Hotshots! Top 30
epg.description:
| +TP | Música |

In the mid-70s Diddy David Hamilton was on Radio 1 AND Radio 2 at the same time! And these are a choice selection of his records of the week - his "Hamilton's Hotshots"!
